titleStmt.title: SII 5.986: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 986. (A.R. No. 121 of 1896). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭainta poṉmālai tikaḻtara pāmālai yaṇin=ta parumaṇitiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭa(ṉ)nt Aiyoṭum jayamakaḷ Iruppat taṉ varaimārvaṉ taṉateṉap peṟṟu tirumakaḷ Orutaṉi yiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarn=ta kaṟpiṉaḷāki
viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppa ticaitoṟum tikiriyoṭum ceṅkol naṭappa A(k)kilapuvaṉamum kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭaimīmicai niḻaṟṟa karuṅkali yoḷittu vaṉpilattiṭaik kiṭappa(pa) kuḷattiṭait teliṅkavīmaṉ vilaṅkal (vī)mi
cai yeṟavum kaliṅka miriyak kaṉal Eri parukavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalattāṅki nitirun tu vaṭatitai vaṭippaṭuttaruḷi teṉ ticai tarumamum tavamum tāṉamum taḻaippa vetamum meymaiyum Ātiyukam po
lat talaitalai ciṟappa van=ta ruḷi velaṟkarum poṟpuli yāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyiṟ kellām Iṉṉuyir tāypol(t) taṇṇaḷi parappi taḷittaṉi pārttu maṇmuḻutuṅ kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu taṉ
koyil koṟṟavācalpuṟattu maṇinā voṭumkaRead ºvoṭuṅka.vi[jaya]mum pukazu meṉmel Oṅka ceziyar veJcuram pukac ceralar kaTal puka Azitaru ciṅkaLar AJci vaJcamarak kaṅkar tiRaiyiTa kaṉṉaTar veṉṉaTa koṅkar Otuṅkak koṅkaNar cAya maRRetitiRead ºṟetti.
cai maṉṉarum tan=ta mak karaṇeṉa tirumalar cevaṭi Urimaiyil Iṟaiñci tolalai yeḻulakamum toḻuteḻa teṇṟiyaRead toṉṟiya.mullaivāṇakai mukkoṉkiḻānaṭi yumaiyoṭum caṅkara ṉimaiyaccimai yattirun=ta teṉa porutti yuṭaṉiruppa Āṅkavaṉ ma
kiḻum kaṅkaiyopapākiya terivayar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappaṭiRead piṭi.puṉitakuṇavaṉitai tiripuvaṉamuṭaiyāḷ tiruvuḷḷat taruḷ muḻutum Uṭaiyāḷ Eṉa Uṭaṉiruppa vīrasiṁhāsa ṉattu mukkoṉkiḻāṉaṭika(ḷ)ḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=ta ru
ḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tiri[bhuvanacakra] vatti śrīvikra macoḻa- de vaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu siṁha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum Ekādiśi yum peṟṟa tiruvātirai nāḷ rācātirācavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvālināṭṭubrahmade cama śrīmummuṭico
ḻacaturvedi maṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom Ivvūr brabhmasā nam rājendra coḻaṉ perampalattey peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhai yom kūṭṭakuṟaivaṟa kūṭiyirun tu paṇikka Iṉṉāṭṭu nāṅkūrnāṭṭu nāṅkūruṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭu
ṭaiyār koyilil śrīmaheśvara kkaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum vāriyapperumakkaḷum tevarkalmikaḷum palapala niman=ta kkāṟarum kaṇṭu kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻañceriyuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḷain=ta koḷariyā
r Ikkoyilil cuṟṟuteruvil taṉiṉiṉṟuveṇṟāṉRead veṉṟāṉ.maṭattil tiruviḻā cevikka van=ta śrīmāheśva raākku Uṇṇa Eṅkaḷūr piṭākai potamaṟaiyāṉ kuṭiyil kaṭṭaḷaiyil śrīde vivatikku kiḻakku maturān=ta kavāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇā
ṟṟu Iraṇṭām caturattu kuṭivilai koḷḷa Iṉṉilam kuṭivilai viṟṟa pāratuvājaṉ tirukkaṇaṇapuramuṭaiyāṉ tāmotiraṉum Ivaṉ tamaiyaṉ tirukkaṇṇapura(m)muṭaiyāṉ kecava(ṉ)ṉum pālāśri yaṉ Aṭikaḷ nakkaṉum nakkaṉ tirukkaṇṇapuramuṭaiyāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭom Iccatirattil
nāṅkaḷ mikiti kuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟukuṭutta nilam Āṟumāvum kuṭuttu nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu patiṉeṭṭu Ikkācu 10 8- m koṇṭu Iṉṉilam Āṟumāvum vaṇṭāḻañceriuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḷain=ta koḷariyārkku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom Iṉṉilam(m)
Āṟumāvum maṭappuṟamāka Iṟai Iḻiccukaikku Araiyaṉ Aḷaiñcakoḷariyārkaḷ vāriyapperumakkaḷvacam Oṭukkiṉa kācu nūṟu Ikkācu 100- ṟum koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceyvatāy paḻamperum paḻamtaramum tavittu Aḷain=ta koḷariviḷākameṉṟu paṉṉiraṇṭām tarattile Ācandra kālam maṭa
kkile Iṟaiyili ceytu tan=to m Ippaṭi Iṉilam kaikkoṇṭu tiruvīti tirucciṟṟamapalam Uṭaiyār Anva yame Iṉṉilam payir Eṟṟuviccu śrīmāheśva rarai Ivaraiyaṉ Aḷaiñcakoḷariyār dharmma māka candrādi ttavaṟ kaveṇṟu[ p-Read niṟkaveṉṟu. paṇikka mahā] sahai (yi)uḷ Irun tu paṇittār kurovi veṇkāṭute
varpaṭṭar paṇiyālum kurovi śrīrāmadanmapriyabha ṭṭaso mayājiyār paṇiyālum veṇṇaikkūttapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kurovi Erimiḷakubhoja- ṉapaṭṭasomai yājiyār paṇiyālum tiyakai Iḷākarapaṭṭar paṇiyālum nālūr māṭalaṉ ciriya nampipaṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum vaṅkipuṟattu kovarddha
napaṭṭar paṇiyālum pārdvaāja n veṇkāṭutevaṉ kecuvaṉār paṇiyālum tivetaikomapuṟattu tāmotirapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kāśya paṉ kaṇṇaṉ Irun=ta- nārayaṇaṉār paṇiyālum pāradvāji tirukkaṇṇapuramuṭaiyāṉ tāmotiranār paṇiyālum vaṅkipuṟattu Utaiyapākkarapaṭṭi paṇiyālu
m vicaka paṭṭa pocancau paṇiyālum vaṅkipuṟattu Erujapūṣapaṭṭasomayājiyār paṇiyālum muppirāl Ilakṣma ṇapaṭṭasomayājiyār paṇiyālum vaṅkippuṟattu śrīvāsudeva paṭṭasomayājiyār paṇi
yālum śrīmātavapaṭṭar paṇiyālum tivetaikomapuṟattu ṉārāyaṇapaṭṭar paṇiyaālum Uṟuppuṭṭur ko paṭṭar paṇiyālum Uṟuppuṭṭur veṇkāṭutevapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kṣaṇiyan cīrāman tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyānār paṇiyālum kṣaṇiyan cīrāma
n kecavanār paṇiyālum pa ramuṭai yār tiruveṇkāṭuṭai yānār paṇiyālum vaṅkippuṟattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭar paṇiyālum pāra[ dvā ci] kecavaṉ veṇkāṭutevaṉār paṇiyālum cān tūr paṟpanārāyaṇapaṭṭar paṇiyālum piṟāṅkaḷur yajñasahasra r pa
ṇiyālum Uṟuppuṭṭur di vākarapaṭṭar paṇiyālum cān tur Aṉan=ta nārāyaṇapaṭṭar paṇiyālum komaṭattu viṣṇu paṭṭar paṇiyālum Iḻakkan=ti rattu kkuṭaiyānpaṭṭar paṇiyālum Iḻukkan=ti vattu paṟpanāpapaṭṭā paṇiyālum vaṅkipuṟattu śrīcaṭakopasahasra r pa
ṇiyālum vaṅkippuṟattu puruṣottamapaṭṭar paṇiyālum vaṅkipuṟattu tiruvaraicu Aṭikaḷ paṇiyālum vaṅkipuṟattu Iḷaiyacaṅkaranārāyaṇasahasra r paṇiyālum Ātra yan śrīnivāsa n tiruveṅkaṭattin paṇiyālum Uḻaiccāḷan ceṭṭampi Irun=ta nārāyaṇanār paṇiyā
lum pirayākaic caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭar paṇiyālum vaṅkippuṟattu śrīmātavapaṭṭar paṇiyālum meṟpuṟattu kūttāṭipaṭṭar paṇiyālum penṉampuṟattu Irun=ta- nārāyaṇasahasra r paṇiyālum paṭṭar paṇiyālum Uṟuppuṭṭur cīraṅkanātapaṭṭar
paṇiyālum vāñai kecavasahasra r paṇiyālum paṇippaṇiyāl Ivai Ūrkaṇakku tiruvāliuṭai yān cāttan cumaran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai rājendra coḻacceri kaṇakkan tiruvāliuṭai yān tiruveṇkāṭuṭai yān coṟuṭai yanen Ivai En neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.986 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
